text: [USAGE-DEPRECATED] a11y eval used — scheduled for removal. tag=0x300AE "Slack API: Applications | Slack - Chrome" hint=none expr=(function(){ var apps = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll
[COMPETE] CSS selector parser alongside grap: support >> [role=button][name=Save] syntax for external users, grap remains internal power syntax
[COMPETE] Scenario step expect + recovery: Action-Expect-Recovery pattern per step, auto-retry with recovery handler before failing
[COMPETE] Experience DB sharing: export/import mechanism for community app profiles (like DirectShell vision of shared configs)
[COMPETE] Rust performance evaluation: benchmark UIA enumeration .NET vs Rust, consider native module for hot paths
[BUG] ask gpt CDP stuck at EDITOR-WAIT: ChatGPT page #prompt-textarea not found even when page is idle. Separate from FindAllPrompts blocked false-negative. Blocks all ask gpt/claude commands.

[BUG] ValuePattern.Value read-back empty/stale after SetValue on Windows 11 Notepad RichEditD2DPT — expect value_contains fails immediately after successful set_value. ReadElementValue returns old content. Likely RichEditD2DPT caches Value or doesn't implement GetValue properly. Workaround: use TextPattern for doc content instead of ValuePattern.

[FEATURE] a11y close shared close-all helper: 'wkappbot a11y close {proc:X} --all --show-dialogs' — first runs find to list target windows + detect modals, prompts user-style output before actual close. Avoids the user-Notepad session-restore trap.

title: [CLEANUP] test-artifact grap verify MISS entries
rootCause: BUG-AUTO fired on empty grap pattern {} during focusless-demo test runs (test YAML passed just the hwnd without a user-supplied grap). Not an actual bug — test artifact.

text: [FEATURE] scenario window_close popup dialog auto-response: when window_close triggers save/confirm dialog, scenario should have declarative dialog_policy (save|dont_save|cancel|ask_user) with auto-dismiss via UIA Invoke on dialog buttons. Currently CLOSE-GUARD only detects+logs but doesn't auto-respond — user must add extra Invoke step. Make it first-class scenario primitive.

title: [BUG] agent exit 0 + stderr: investigate or silence
text: [BUG] agent exit 0 + stderr: investigate or silence
rootCause: agent command exits 0 (success) yet emits stderr content — CLI treats this as suppressed-error. Either legitimate noise (progress/info on stderr) needing classification, or real error with wrong exit code. Need to capture actual stderr content to decide.

title: [BUG] UIA focus steal during ask-* CDP commands
text: [BUG] UIA focus steal during ask-* CDP commands
rootCause: ask gpt/claude/gemini CDP flows trigger UIA focus steal (hwnd attach or SetForegroundWindow) bypassing Probe() guard. Detected by focus-steal tripwire. Root cause likely in CdpClient attach/activate path or SlackSocketClient fallback. caller=<>c.<Main>b__1631_20 indicates ask after-send path.

title: [CHORE] old notebook data recovery from previous sessions
text: [CHORE] old notebook data recovery from previous sessions
rootCause: Duplicate entries across DG-WKAppBot and DGWCS-WKAppBot.CLI origins — same recovery task. Copy suggestions.jsonl + experience/ from backup to current hq.

title: [CHORE] public repo checklist before going public
text: [CHORE] public repo checklist before going public
rootCause: Duplicate across origins — audit committed files for secrets/PII, strip hq data from tracking, scrub commit history, finalize LICENSE/README/AGENTS before public release.

title: [BUG] focus-steal RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync exhausted (unrecoverable)
rootCause: After UIA focus steal detected, RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync fails 32 retries @ after-send-Gemini. prevFg still holds but foreground refuses to revert. Likely related to sibling [BUG] UIA focus steal during ask-*. Fix candidate: SetForegroundWindow retry budget + AllowSetForegroundWindow + brief ASFW_ANY window.

text: [BUG-AUTO] `agent` exited 0 but wrote to stderr — error suppressed
